name: Cqrs.Command

unions.name: CommandResponse
unions.comment: Represents the possible states of a command.

aliases.name: StandardRequestConfig
aliases.comment: Configuration for requests resulting in a `Cmd`
aliases.type: { headers : List.List Http.Header, timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, tracker : Maybe.Maybe String.String, risky : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: TaskRequestConfig
aliases.comment: Configuration for requests resulting in a `Task`
aliases.type: { headers : List.List Http.Header, timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, risky : Basics.Bool }

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decodes a given payload into a `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e`.

values.name: fail
values.comment:
Constructs the `Failed` variant of a `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e`.

This is useful for testing how your UI will respond to the sad path, without actually sending a command.

values.name: failed
values.comment:
Checks if a given `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e` is a `Failed` variant.

    failed Succeeded --> False

    failed (Failed "reason") --> True

values.name: fromRemoteData
values.comment: Converts a given `RemoteData x (CommandResponse e)` into a `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e`.
values.type: (e -> f) -> f -> RemoteData.RemoteData x (Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e) -> Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse f

values.name: fromResult
values.comment: Converts a `Result e a` to a `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e`

values.name: mapError
values.comment: Maps the `Failed` variant of a given `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e`.

values.name: partition
values.comment: Partitions a series of `CommandResponse e` instances into a tuple of successful and unsuccessful responses.

values.name: reason
values.comment:
If a given `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e` was unsuccessful, the reason for the failure will be returned.

    reason Succeeded --> Nothing

    reason (Failed "reason") --> Just "reason"

values.name: request
values.comment: Sends a command to the given URL with the provided body and returns a parsed `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e` in turn.
values.type: String.String -> (e -> f) -> f -> Json.Encode.Value -> Json.Decode.Decoder e -> (Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse f -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: requestTask
values.comment:
Sends a command to the given URL and returns a `Task` containing the parsed `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e`.
The value contained within the `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e`, will be the value parsed via the provided decoder.
values.type: String.String -> (e -> f) -> f -> Json.Encode.Value -> Json.Decode.Decoder e -> Task.Task () (Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse f)

values.name: requestTaskWithConfig
values.comment: Similar to `requestTask` but a `TaskRequestConfig` can be passed in for cases where customisation of the request headers, etc are desired.
values.type: Cqrs.Command.TaskRequestConfig -> String.String -> (e -> f) -> f -> Json.Encode.Value -> Json.Decode.Decoder e -> Task.Task () (Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse f)

values.name: requestWithConfig
values.comment: Similar to `request` but a `StandardRequestConfig` can be passed in for cases where customisation of the request headers, etc are desired.
values.type: Cqrs.Command.StandardRequestConfig -> String.String -> (e -> f) -> f -> Json.Encode.Value -> Json.Decode.Decoder e -> (Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse f -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: succeed
values.comment:
Constructs the `Succeeded` variant of a `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e`.

This is useful for testing how your UI will respond to the happy path, without actually sending a command.

values.name: succeeded
values.comment:
Checks if a given `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e` is a `Succeeded` variant.

    succeeded Succeeded --> True

    succeeded (Failed "reason") --> False

values.name: toMaybe
values.comment: Converts a `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e` to a `Maybe a`

values.name: toResult
values.comment: Converts a `Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e` to a `Result e a`

values.name: unpack
values.comment: Convert a `CommandResponse e` to an `a` by applying either the first function if the `CommandResponse e` is an `Failed` variant or the second function if the `CommandResponse e` is a `Succeeded` variant.

values.name: unwrap
values.comment: Convert a `CommandResponse e` to an `a` by applying a function if the `CommandResponse e` is a `Succeeded` variant or using the provided default value if it is an `Failed` variant.

name: Cqrs.Query

unions.name: QueryResponse
unions.comment: Represents the possible states of a query.

aliases.name: StandardRequestConfig
aliases.comment: Configuration for requests resulting in a `Cmd`
aliases.type: { headers : List.List Http.Header, timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, tracker : Maybe.Maybe String.String, risky : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: TaskRequestConfig
aliases.comment: Configuration for requests resulting in a `Task`
aliases.type: { headers : List.List Http.Header, timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, risky : Basics.Bool }

values.name: data
values.comment:
If a given `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a` was successful, the data it contains will be returned.

    data (Data []) --> Just []

    data (Error "reason") --> Nothing

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decodes a given payload into a `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a`.
values.type: Json.Decode.Decoder a -> Json.Decode.Decoder e -> Json.Decode.Decoder (Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a)

values.name: fail
values.comment:
Constructs the `Error` variant of a `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a`.

This is useful for testing how your UI will respond to the sad path, without actually sending a query.

values.name: failed
values.comment:
Checks if a given `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a` is an `Error` variant.

    failed (Data []) --> False

    failed (Error "reason") --> True

values.name: filter
values.comment: Filter a given `QueryResponse e a` if it is in the `Data` variant and should the predicate not pass, map to a `Error` variant with the given error. Useful for error value mapping within a given domain.
values.type: e -> (a -> Basics.Bool) -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a

values.name: fromRemoteData
values.comment: Converts a given `RemoteData x (Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a)` into a `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse f a`.
values.type: (e -> f) -> f -> RemoteData.RemoteData x (Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a) -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse f a

values.name: fromResult
values.comment: Converts a `Result e a` to a `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a`
values.type: Result.Result e a -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a

values.name: map
values.comment: Maps the `Data` variant of a given `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a` and returns a `Cqrs.Query.Response b`.
values.type: (a -> b) -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e b

values.name: mapBoth
values.comment: Maps both the `Data` and the `Error` variant of a given `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a`.
values.type: (e -> f) -> (a -> b) -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse f b

values.name: mapError
values.comment: Maps the `Error` variant of a given `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a`.
values.type: (e -> f) -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse f a

values.name: merge
values.comment: When a given `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a` is actually in the form `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse a a` then we can return the underlying value from either state. This is especially useful when the error and value have been mapped to domain types.

values.name: partition
values.comment: Partitions a series of `QueryResponse e a` instances into a tuple of successful and unsuccessful responses.
values.type: List.List (Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a) -> ( List.List a, List.List e )

values.name: reason
values.comment:
If a given `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a` was unsuccessful, the reason for the failure will be returned.

    reason (Data []) --> Nothing

    reason (Error "reason") --> Just "reason"

values.name: request
values.comment:
Sends a query to the given URL and returns a `Cmd` for the given `msg` containing the parsed `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a`.
The value contained within the `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a`, will be the value parsed via the provided decoder.
values.type: String.String -> (e -> f) -> f -> (Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse f a -> msg) -> Json.Decode.Decoder a -> Json.Decode.Decoder e -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: requestTask
values.comment:
Sends a query to the given URL and returns a `Task` which will contain the parsed `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a`.
The value contained within the `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a`, will be the value parsed via the provided decoder.
values.type: String.String -> (e -> f) -> f -> Json.Decode.Decoder a -> Json.Decode.Decoder e -> Task.Task () (Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse f a)

values.name: requestTaskWithConfig
values.comment: Similar to `requestTask` but a `TaskRequestConfig` can be passed in for cases where customisation of the request headers, etc are desired.
values.type: Cqrs.Query.TaskRequestConfig -> String.String -> (e -> f) -> f -> Json.Decode.Decoder a -> Json.Decode.Decoder e -> Task.Task () (Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse f a)

values.name: requestWithConfig
values.comment: Similar to `request` but a `StandardRequestConfig` can be passed in for cases where customisation of the request headers, etc are desired.
values.type: Cqrs.Query.StandardRequestConfig -> String.String -> (e -> f) -> f -> (Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse f a -> msg) -> Json.Decode.Decoder a -> Json.Decode.Decoder e -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: succeed
values.comment:
Constructs the `Data` variant of a `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a`.

This is useful for testing how your UI will respond to the happy path, without actually sending a query.

values.name: succeeded
values.comment:
Checks if a given `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a` is a `Data` variant.

    succeeded (Data []) --> True

    succeeded (Error "reason") --> False

values.name: toMaybe
values.comment: Converts a `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a` to a `Maybe a`

values.name: toResult
values.comment: Converts a `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a` to a `Result e a`
values.type: Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a -> Result.Result e a

values.name: unpack
values.comment: Convert a `QueryResponse e a` to an `a` by applying either the first function if the `QueryResponse e a` is an `Error` variant or the second function if the `QueryResponse e a` is a `Data` variant.
values.type: (e -> b) -> (a -> b) -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a -> b

values.name: unwrap
values.comment: Convert a `QueryResponse e a` to an `a` by applying a function if the `QueryResponse e a` is a `Data` variant or using the provided default value if it is an `Error` variant.
values.type: b -> (a -> b) -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a -> b

values.name: withDefault
values.comment: Provides a default case for a `Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a` in place of the value held within the `Error` variant.
